title: Design Improved Landing Page Layout
description: Create a visually appealing and modern layout for the landing page, enhancing the user experience and aligning with best practices.
details: Analyze the current landing page in apps/web/pages or equivalent. Sketch a new layout that includes a prominent hero section, clear value proposition, call-to-action (CTA) buttons, and visually distinct sections for features, authentication, and AI capabilities. Ensure mobile responsiveness and accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA). Prepare a Figma or similar mockup if needed for stakeholder review.
test_strategy: Review the new layout visually in browser (desktop and mobile). Validate accessibility using browser tools. Confirm all key sections are present and visually distinct.

title: Implement Landing Page Components
description: Develop reusable React components for the new landing page sections based on the improved design.
details: In apps/web/components, create or update components such as HeroSection, FeaturesSection, AuthCTA, and AIIntegrationHighlight. Use TypeScript and follow project conventions. Ensure components are modular, styled (using CSS modules, styled-components, or the project's chosen method), and responsive. Integrate icons or images as needed.
test_strategy: Unit test each component with Jest and React Testing Library. Verify props, rendering, and responsiveness. Check for accessibility (aria labels, keyboard navigation).

title: Integrate Components into Landing Page Route
description: Assemble the new components into the main landing page route, replacing or enhancing the existing content.
details: Update apps/web/pages/index.tsx (or equivalent) to import and arrange the new components in the desired order. Ensure navigation, links, and CTAs work as intended. Remove or refactor any obsolete code from the previous landing page implementation.
test_strategy: Manual test in browser to verify correct assembly, navigation, and interactivity. Automated test to check route renders all sections. Smoke test navigation from landing page to other routes.

title: Polish Styling and Add Animations
description: Enhance the landing page with polished styling and subtle animations to improve user engagement.
details: Refine CSS for spacing, typography, color palette, and visual hierarchy. Add subtle animations (e.g., fade-in, button hover effects) using CSS transitions or a library like Framer Motion if already in use. Ensure animations do not hinder accessibility or performance.
test_strategy: Visual inspection for smooth animations and consistent styling. Lighthouse audit for performance and accessibility. Cross-browser testing for style consistency.
